title: El-cheep-o Miniprep
author: Magdalena M Julkowska
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.peudjew

steps.title: ·Spin 3ml of the overnight culture to pellet cells (1
steps.instruction: ·Spin 3ml of the overnight culture to pellet cells (1.5-ml for time) @13000 rpm for 5 min

steps.title: ·Add 250 ml of sol P1+Rnase...
steps.instruction: ·Add 250 ml of sol P1+Rnase 5ml and vortex to resuspend cells

steps.title: ·Add 250 ml of sol P2 and mix gently
steps.instruction: ·Add 250 ml of sol P2 and mix gently

steps.title: ·Add 350 ml of sol P3 and mix gently
steps.instruction: ·Add 350 ml of sol P3 and mix gently

steps.title: ·Take 750 ml of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: ·Take 750 ml of the supernatant and put in a new eppendorf tube and add in this tube 750 ml of isopropanol
